bob-effectivedurability.config.name: Config
bob-effectivedurability.config.always_en: Whether to enable the durability tooltips at all times or not.
bob-effectivedurability.config.show_cros: Whether to enable the custom crosshair overlay or not.
bob-effectivedurability.config.show_tool: 'Vanilla' for vanilla durability, 'Effective' for effective durability, 'Both' to display both.
bob-effectivedurability.config.primary_c: The color of the durability tooltip.
bob-effectivedurability.config.secondary: The color of the vanilla durability when displaying both.
bob-effectivedurability.config.crosshair: How long to show the durability of the item next to the crosshair, in seconds. Set to negative values to show forever.
bob-effectivedurability.config.durabilit: The effective durability an item has to be below to show the durability by the tooltip. Set to 0 for any durability.
